title: Eurycaulis anthrene
taxonomy: Eurycaulis anthrene is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is native to Australia and is also known as the "Forked Witchetty Bush" or "Forked Witchetty." This plant is a hemiparasitic shrub, obtaining some of its nutrients from other plants in its vicinity. The exact classification of Eurycaulis anthrene can also be broken down further into the genus Eurycaulis and the species E. anthrene. Further research may provide more detailed information on its classification.
properties: Eurycaulis anthrene, a plant native to Australia, has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties, although more research is required to confirm its efficacy.
